data.narrative:
Second Front Systems is a Series B-stage defense and security company founded by Peter Dixon and Tyler Sweatt that has raised $90M+ to date. Valuation assessment relies on a peer set of 6 same-sector, same-stage private companies (Vannevar Labs, Dream Security, Harmattan AI, Castelion, Defense Unicorns, and one additional unnamed peer) plus 2 public comparables (DRSHF, IDEAFORGE.NS), spanning 8 private and 2 public references in the Defense & Security sector.

Two triangulation methods apply here. Stage-progression uses the $90M total raised as a valuation proxy and applies a 1.9x step-up multiplier typical of Series B progression, implying $171M. Peer-median analysis across the 6 same-stage defense peers yields a median valuation of $1.2B, with a range of $1.0B to $1.5B. The peer set shows concentration at the higher end: Vannevar Labs, Dream Security, and Harmattan AI all trade at $1.4B–$1.5B, while Castelion and Defense Unicorns anchor at $1.0B each.

Triangulation across both methods supports a valuation range of $145M (low) to $1.4B (high), with a median of $686M. The wide dispersion reflects material uncertainty regarding Second Front's relative market position and growth trajectory versus better-capitalized peers. Reconciling stage-progression and peer-median requires evidence on product maturity, customer traction, and unit economics relative to the named peer set.
